recommendations.title: Stagecoach
recommendations.overview: A group of people traveling on a stagecoach find their journey complicated by the threat of Geronimo, and learn something about each other in the process.

recommendations.title: The Grapes of Wrath
recommendations.overview: Tom Joad returns to his home after a jail sentence to find his family kicked out of their farm due to foreclosure. He catches up with them on his Uncle’s farm, and joins them the next day as they head for California and a new life... Hopefully.

recommendations.title: The Searchers
recommendations.overview: As a Civil War veteran spends years searching for a young niece captured by Indians, his motivation becomes increasingly questionable.

recommendations.title: Two Rode Together
recommendations.overview: Two tough westerners bring home a group of settlers who have spent years as Comanche hostages.

recommendations.title: The Quiet Man
recommendations.overview: An American man returns to the village of his birth in Ireland, where he finds love and conflict.

recommendations.title: My Darling Clementine
recommendations.overview: Three brothers stop off for a night in the town of Tombstone. The next morning they find one of their brothers dead and their cattle stolen. They decide to take revenge on the culprits.

recommendations.title: Cheyenne Autumn
recommendations.overview: A reluctant cavalry Captain must track a defiant tribe of migrating Cheyenne.

recommendations.title: 3 Godfathers
recommendations.overview: Three outlaws on the run discover a dying woman and her baby. They swear to bring the infant to safety across the desert, even at the risk of their own lives.

recommendations.title: Donovan's Reef
recommendations.overview: After her great aunt's death, a high-society woman arrives on a Hawaiian island in search of the heir - the father she has never met.

recommendations.title: Sergeant Rutledge
recommendations.overview: Respected black cavalry Sergeant Brax Rutledge stands court-martial for raping and killing a white woman and murdering her father, his superior officer.
